{
  "claims": [
    "Retail theft accounts for nearly $30 billion in economic loss per year.",
    "A few repeat offenders are driving the retail crime in San Francisco.",
    "The San Francisco Police Department identified 116 repeat offenders in 2020, 33% of whom were rearrested.",
    "In Orange County, 45% of individuals prosecuted for theft-related crimes were repeat offenders.",
    "23% of individuals prosecuted for theft-related crimes in Orange County had three or more prior convictions.",

    "AB 1708 aims to provide penalties or mandated rehabilitation programs to change offender behavior.",
